title: HydroJEPA: Mini-JEPA Foundation Model Fleet Enables Agentic Hydrologic Intelligence
description: Code accompanying the manuscript 'Mini-JEPA Foundation Model Fleet Enables Agentic Hydrologic Intelligence' submitted to Remote Sensing Applications: Society and Environment. Implements a fleet of five small sensor-specialized JEPA foundation models pretrained on Google Earth Engine satellite products (Sentinel-2 optical, Sentinel-1 SAR, MODIS thermal, Sentinel-2 phenology, and SRTM + SoilGrids topo-soil), with per-modality interpretability/geometry/complementarity evaluation and an agentic routing layer for hydrologic question answering.
